meta.description: US-based tech companies large enough to run dedicated recruiting + internship programs. Target for LinkedIn outreach to recruiters. Populate each company's 'recruiters' array over time with the recruiter object schema below.
meta.use_case: Connect with recruiters at top US tech companies on LinkedIn to source SWE / AI internship opportunities.

recruiter_object_schema.focus_area: e.g. University Recruiting / SWE Intern / New Grad

company_field_legend.name: Company name
company_field_legend.linkedin_company_url: Company LinkedIn page. Curated entries are hand-verified; bulk entries are auto-derived from the name.
company_field_legend.recruiter_search_url: LinkedIn People-tab link filtered to recruiters at this company (open & harvest profiles)
company_field_legend.id: Unique sequential ID (C0001...) for counting & tracking
company_field_legend.linkedin_url_verified: true = hand-verified slug; false = auto-derived from name (may 404 / hit wrong page — spot-check before trusting)
company_field_legend.sector: Primary sector partition key used by Codex sector workers and UI filtering
company_field_legend.description: Concise company description for search, semantic matching, and outreach context

meta.recruiter_links_note: recruiter_search_url is a name-based LinkedIn People search ('<company> recruiter') that works for every company without needing the exact company page slug — open it to see current recruiters, then paste individual profile URLs into recruiters[]. Each company has a unique 'id' (C0001...) so the list is countable/verifiable. NOTE: the first ~263 entries are curated with HQ/size/company-slug; the bulk entries carry verified real names + working recruiter links, with HQ/slug left blank to enrich.
meta.notes: Sector working file for Other / Mixed. Codex agents edit only this file; the orchestrator merges sector files back into canonical recruiter.json.
meta.ui_directory: recruiter-directory/ (Next.js searchable UI with direct LinkedIn links + CSV export)
meta.population_progress: Codex sector split. 873 companies populated with 1937 total recruiters; 1250 company descriptions missing. Merge run: 2026-06-01

companies.name: Honeywell
companies.description: Honeywell provides industrial automation, aerospace, building automation, and energy-transition technologies, including software, controls, sensors, and systems for manufacturers, buildings, and aviation customers.

recruiters.name: Sherry Karr
recruiters.title: University Relations
recruiters.focus_area: Internships, new grad roles, early career (Aerospace software engineering and other engineering)
recruiters.notes: Part of Honeywell University Relations team. Focuses on internships, new grads, and early career positions including Aerospace SWE.

recruiters.name: Alyson Davis
recruiters.title: University Recruiting Leader
recruiters.focus_area: University Recruiting / Early Career Talent / DEI programs (partners with Korn Ferry)
recruiters.notes: Oversees teams of recruiters/coordinators for diverse intern and early career talent across disciplines at Honeywell. Previously expanded University Relations programs.

recruiters.name: Sherley Rodriguez
recruiters.title: Talent Acquisition Manager – University Relations
recruiters.focus_area: University Relations strategy, campus recruitment programs, early career talent
recruiters.notes: Builds and executes university relations strategies and campus recruitment programs at Honeywell. Global university relations focal for certain units.

companies.name: Rockwell Automation
companies.description: Rockwell Automation provides industrial automation and digital transformation hardware, software, controls, and services that help manufacturers connect, monitor, and optimize production operations.

recruiters.name: Jaimie Thomas
recruiters.title: Early Career Workforce Manager
recruiters.focus_area: Early Career / Interns / Co-ops / University Relations strategy
recruiters.notes: Leads strategy and programs for interns, co-ops, and early career talent development at Rockwell Automation. Team recognized with Campus Forward awards.

recruiters.name: Liz Harbour
recruiters.title: Early Career Talent Advisor / Early Careers Recruiter
recruiters.focus_area: Early Careers recruiting, interns, co-ops, next-generation talent
recruiters.notes: Actively recruits for early career roles and posts frequently about interns, co-ops, and early career hires at Rockwell. Award-winning profile.

recruiters.name: Nina Unger
recruiters.title: Early Careers Recruiter
recruiters.focus_area: Technical recruiting for early careers including Embedded Software Engineer co-ops and interns
recruiters.notes: Handles technical recruiting for early career roles at Rockwell Automation, including resume advice for students and university events. Strong SWE match.
